page: Microsoft Azure EC32es_v5 is an x86_64 architecture server instance belonging to the ECEV5 family. It features 32 dedicated vCPUs powered by an Intel processor and runs on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. The instance is configured with 256.0 GB of system memory, yielding a memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core.

This server does not include any local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met using external volumes. It is, however, Premium Storage capable, allowing connection to high-throughput persistent disks. The instance does not feature any graphics processing units, limiting its utility for hardware-accelerated workloads.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the high memory density relative to the vCPU count makes this instance suitable for memory-intensive applications without paying for excess compute cores. The hardware profile is designed for workloads such as relational databases, in-memory caches, and enterprise applications that require substantial memory capacity but do not require local temporary storage or GPU acceleration.
description: The Microsoft Azure EC32es_v5 is a memory-optimized server instance from the ECEV5 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 32 dedicated x86_64 vCPUs powered by an Intel processor and is equipped with 256.0 GB of RAM, providing a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per vCPU. The instance does not include local storage or graphics processing units, but it is Premium Storage capable, allowing for high-performance external disk attachments. This hardware profile offers qualitative cost efficiency for memory-heavy workloads by balancing a high memory capacity with a moderate vCPU count. It is designed for workloads such as memory-intensive databases, enterprise applications, and in-memory caching systems.
og_description: Microsoft Azure EC32es_v5 is a memory-optimized server featuring 32 dedicated Intel vCPUs, 256 GB of RAM, and Premium Storage capability on the Hyper-V hypervisor, with no local storage or GPUs.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure EC32es_v5 is a memory-optimized server with 32 dedicated Intel vCPUs, 256 GB RAM, and Premium Storage capability.
tagline: A memory-optimized virtual instance featuring thirty-two dedicated cores and two hundred fifty-six gigabytes of RAM for memory-intensive enterprise workloads.
bullet_points: 32 dedicated Intel vCPUs on x86_64 architecture
256.0 GB of system memory providing 8.0 GB per core
Premium Storage capable for external disk connectivity
No local storage or GPU resources included
Designed for in-memory caches, databases, and enterprise applications
